# Project Update

The team completed the new prototype last week.

We should extend the timeline to account for testing.

The advanced architecture delivers fast, reliable, and excellent scalable results for our enterprise customers.

The project received strong stakeholder support during the review phase.

Additional context about deployment is provided in the appendix.
